message:
test: expand coverage for Ollama adapter, HTTP serve, and E2E Ollama flows

Add targeted test cases for error paths and edge cases across three
test suites, improving resilience confidence for the Ollama integration
and HTTP serve subsystems.

internal/agent/ollama/adapter_test.go:
- TestNewAdapterFromEnv_DefaultHost: verify adapter creation with
  empty NTM_OLLAMA_HOST falls back to default
- TestListModels_DecodeError: cover malformed JSON response from
  /api/tags endpoint
- TestStreamResponse_NoModel: verify error when streaming without
  a model set
- TestStreamResponse_HTTPError: cover 500 response from /api/generate
- TestStreamResponse_MalformedStreamLine: verify parse error tokens
  propagated through channel on invalid NDJSON lines
- TestPullModelWithProgress_HTTPError: cover 500 on /api/pull
- TestPullModelWithProgress_FailedStatus: cover "failed" final status
  in pull progress stream
- TestDeleteModel_HTTPError: cover 404/model-not-found response on
  /api/delete

internal/serve/server_test.go:
- TestCheckWSOrigin_LocalMode/EmptyMode/NoOriginHeader/AllowedOrigin/
  RejectedOrigin/MalformedOrigin/MalformedAllowedOrigin: WebSocket
  origin validation for all auth mode × origin combinations
- TestExtractAuthClaims_NoClaims/WithClaims/WrongType: auth context
  extraction edge cases
- TestValidateConfig_APIKeyNoKey/OIDCMissingIssuer/OIDCMissingJWKS/
  MTLSMissing/InvalidAuthMode: config validation error paths for
  each auth mode

tests/e2e/ollama_test.go (new):
- E2E test suite for Ollama spawn, model listing, and prompt execution
  flows using httptest mock servers and NTM JSON CLI output parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
